creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Apologies, did not mean to set Closed->FIXED.

Since we don't have a resolution like 'Send Upstream', and 'Rejected' (not accepted) isn't quite relevant (there was no proposal/patch) and not quite the same as WONTFIX, leave this Open for now.

CC'd Dimitry in case he's aware of a fix in subsequent versions, for which a backport/patch may be available to fix llvm60
